reason: A woman’s confession hides decades of small-town secrets under a veneer of respect.
Quiz-show scandal unmasks decades of deceit, and a lawyer must unearth buried motives.
A priest’s shooting reveals a web of historical sins and personal obsessions.
A cold case skeleton forces a sheriff to reexamine past alliances and broken faith.
A cat-stolen inheritance exposes long-buried greed in a tranquil estate.
A bank teller’s slip uncovers a covert plan, and she digs into hidden motives.
A missing cat reveals the undercurrents of a Paris neighborhood’s dark pacts.
A detective’s obsession with a prosecutor’s death leads him to old betrayals.
A nurse tending the wounded hears stories that hint at decades-old family debts.
A journalist’s closer look at Olympic success unravels corruption in town lore.
